impact: This advances the PP&D automation plan by proving official uploads, submissions, certifications, payments, cancellations, inspection scheduling, MFA, CAPTCHA, account creation, and password recovery are fail-closed unless the exact required user confirmation is present, while still refusing non-automatable verification and account flows.
summary: Add deterministic Playwright guardrail tests for high-risk DevHub actions and a narrow confirmation evaluator used by those tests.
target_task: Task checkbox-46: Add Playwright guardrail tests proving upload, submit, certify, pay, cancel, schedule inspection, MFA, CAPTCHA, account creation, and password recovery actions are refused unless exact user confirmation is present.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
